description: Sample rule documentation for runtime cleanup script quality gates.

rules.name: Avoid MyInvocation.ScriptName bootstrap assumptions
rules.exampleGood: Use $PSScriptRoot with a fallback to Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path.

rules.name: Ignore bin and obj using path segments, not brittle path regexes
Do not print SQL passwords or full command argument arrays from process failures
